docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,550.00 FILED BY GOMEZ, GERMAN AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, JACK DBA NICE & RIGHT FURNITURE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-2004 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, JACK DBA NICE & RIGHT FURNITURE

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-23-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-27-2004 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 MATTER CONTINUED 30 DAYS TO PERMIT DEFT TO DELIVER GOODS. IF NO PARTIES APPEAR, MATTER SHALL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. IF PLTF APPEARS JUDGMENT SHOULD BE ENTERED SUBJECT TO DAMAGES PROOF.
NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO GERMAN GOMEZ RETURNED--NO SUCH NUMBER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, GERMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN, JACK DBA NICE & RIGHT FURNITURE $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $322.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO GOMEZ, GERMAN RETURNED TO COURT -- NO SUCH NUMBER. REM: PLTF'S ADDRESS CORRECTED; JUDGMENT RE-MAILED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, JACK DBA NICE & RIGHT FURNITURE
